PowerShell(git status --porcelain --untracked-files=all; echo "---RECENT FILES \(last 2 days\)---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path "trailr\\app","trailr\\src","packages","supabase" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-2\) -and $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 LastWriteTime, FullName)
